generations.code:
t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    max_a = max(a)
    max_b = max(b)
    max_a_idx = a.index(max_a)
    max_b_idx = b.index(max_b)
    result = []
    for i in range(n):
        if max_a_idx == max_b_idx and i != max_a_idx:
            result.append('0')
        else:
            dominators = [(j) for j in range(n) if j != i and a[j] > a[i] and b[j] > b[i]]
            can_win = True
            for j in dominators:
                beatable = any(k != i and k != j and (a[k] > a[j] or b[k] > b[j]) for k in range(n))
                if not beatable:
                    can_win = False
                    break
            result.append('1' if can_win else '0')
    print(''.join(result))

import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    res = []
    for i in range(n):
        can_win = True
        for j in range(n):
            if i == j: continue
            if a[j] > a[i] and b[j] > b[i]:
                # j dominates i, need someone to beat j that i can beat
                # someone r: (a[r]>a[j] or b[r]>b[j]) and (a[i]>a[r] or b[i]>b[r])
                found = False
                for k in range(n):
                    if k == i or k == j: continue
                    beats_j = a[k] > a[j] or b[k] > b[j]
                    i_beats_k = a[i] > a[k] or b[i] > b[k]
                    if beats_j and i_beats_k:
                        found = True
                        break
                if not found:
                    can_win = False
                    break
        res.append('1' if can_win else '0')
    print(''.join(res))

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()

import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    res = []
    for i in range(n):
        can_win = True
        for j in range(n):
            if i == j: continue
            if a[j] > a[i] and b[j] > b[i]:
                # j dominates i, need someone to beat j that i can beat
                # someone r: (a[r]>a[j] or b[r]>b[j]) and (a[i]>a[r] or b[i]>b[r])
                found = False
                for k in range(n):
                    if k == i or k == j: continue
                    beats_j = a[k] > a[j] or b[k] > b[j]
                    i_beats_k = a[i] > a[k] or b[i] > b[k]
                    if beats_j and i_beats_k:
                        found = True
                        break
                if not found:
                    can_win = False
                    break
        res.append('1' if can_win else '0')
    print(''.join(res))

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()
